name: chain_how_id_use_openclaw_to_replace_a_15km
method: How I’d use OpenClaw to replace a $15k/mo ops + marketing stack (real setup, not theory) I’ve been studying a real setup where one OpenClaw system runs 34 cron jobs and 71 scripts, generates X posts t

stages.task: Pull live system metrics: script count, cron count, agent count, content output volume, estimated monthly ops value replaced. Source: OPS/PRINTMAXX_SYSTEM_MAP.md + OPS/KPI_DASHBOARD.md

Write 3 X posts + 1 thread using real stats. Hook: 'I built the exact system this post describes. Here's what actually running 337 scripts + 33 agents looks like...' — contrast hype vs reality, show real cost ($271/mo claim → validate or correct with our actual infra cost)
Identify 1 packageable product from the system: Claude Code ops config bundle, PRINTMAXX starter kit, or 'autonomous ops audit' consulting offer. Output paste-ready Gumroad listing draft.
Write approved posts to CONTENT/social/posting_queue/ for manual or scheduled posting
